biological_replicate: A multivalent capsule vaccine protects against Klebsiella pneumoniae bloodstream infections in healthy and immunocompromised mice
technical_replicate: sera from immunized mice were diluted 1:100 and added to wells in triplicate
experimental_design: immunized with either EPA carrier protein alone (control) or the K4V-EPA tetravalent vaccine
factor_value: treatment (K1-EPA, K2-EPA, KL102-EPA, KL107-EPA, EPA control)
vaccination groups were as follows: EPA carrier protein alone, K1-EPA, K2-EPA, KL102-EPA, and KL107-EPA
number_of_fractions: no fractionation or pre-fractionation is described
